title: Fixed Anvils
description: Ignores the "prior use" stat when determining the xp cost of enchanting instead using the sum of the enchantment costs of the output. Plus other small tweaks
body:
This mod is inteded to be used with enchantmentdisabler's feature of lowering the max level of an enchantment table, a mod that disables enchanting books in an enchantment table and a villager trade disabling mod to balance enchantments and encourage exploring for high level enchantment books rather than rerolling etables and lecturns. - Ignores the "prior use" stat when determining the xp cost of enchanting instead using the sum of the enchantment costs of the output. - Sets renaming to cost 1xp. - sets repairing to cost 1xp per material used. - removes the ability to combine items(not including books/materials).[removed in 1.0.1] - removes level cap. Examples:
Sword with sharp V(5 xp), unbreaking III(3xp), mending(2xp) + looting III(6xp) = 16xp
Sword with sharp V(5 xp), unbreaking III(3xp), looting III(6xp) + mending(2xp) = 16xp
vs vanilla(assuming max level book were put on one at a time)
Sword with sharp V(5 xp), unbreaking III(3xp), mending(2xp) + looting III(6xp) = 13xp
Sword with sharp V(5 xp), unbreaking III(3xp), looting III(6xp) + mending(2xp) = 9xp
